description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 빛이 굴절되어 다채로운 색상으로 분산되는 과정을 탐구합니다. 투명함과 생생한 스펙트럼 분산 사이의 상호작용을 강조합니다.
description.en: An exploration of light passing through a glass prism, bending and splitting into its constituent colors. Highlighting the interplay of transparency and vibrant spectral dispersion.

prompt: A cinematic, high-detail macro shot of a triangular glass prism on a dark surface. A single beam of intense white light enters from the left, refracting inside the glass, and exiting as a vivid, spreading rainbow spectrum. Prismatic chromatic aberration, caustic light patterns, 8k resolution, ray-tracing, ethereal atmosphere.
